overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character traveling through rural Japanese countryside. The character walks along a dirt path from open fields past wooden fortifications and into a traditional village with thatched-roof architecture.

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along a wide dirt path through rural countryside

entered.detail: wide dirt trail winding through the countryside
tall green trees lining the left side of the path
tall green trees lining the right side of the path
traditional wooden post with lantern on the left side of path
dark smoke rising in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a wide dirt path through open countryside. Tall deciduous trees line both sides of the path while a wooden lantern post stands on the left. Dark smoke rises in the distance against the clear morning sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path next to a tall wooden fence wall with scaffolding visible ahead

entered.detail: tall dark wooden fortification wall running alongside the path
wooden construction scaffolding visible behind the fence
tall green grass growing thick on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues alongside a tall wooden fortification wall on the left. Sunlight filters through the trees creating dappled shadows on the dirt trail. Tall grass grows thick on the right side as the village perimeter approaches, with wooden scaffolding visible behind the fence.

events.description: wild boar appears grazing in the tall white grass to the right of the path
character passes through the wooden village gate entering the settlement

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass approaching the village entrance gate

notable_agents.action: wild boar grazing in the tall white pampas grass

entered.detail: tall white flowering grass growing thick on the right side
large wooden gate structure marking the village entrance
traditional Japanese farmhouse with straw thatched roof visible beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: The character enters an area of tall white pampas grass lining the path. A wild boar grazes in the grass to the right. The wooden village gate comes into view ahead, marking the transition from countryside to the settlement interior.

agents.ego_description: entering the village and approaching a traditional farmhouse with straw bundles

entered.detail: wooden cart loaded with bundles of straw hay
tripod-mounted burning torch illuminating the village entrance
traditional wooden farmhouse with thatched roof and open entrance
large wooden wheel leaning against the cart

segments.scene_description: Passing through the village gate, the scene opens into a traditional Japanese village interior. The character approaches a farmhouse with a cart loaded with straw bundles. Burning torches on tripods mark the entrance, and the path leads toward the house entrance shaded by the thatched roof.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a samurai travels from the open, smoke-tinged countryside into the heart of a traditional Japanese village. It begins on a wide dirt path lined with deciduous trees and a lone lantern post, with dark smoke rising against a clear morning sky in the distance. As the character advances, the path narrows alongside a tall wooden fortification wall where sunlight filters through the canopy to create dappled shadows over thick grass and scaffolding. The scene then shifts into a stretch of tall white pampas grass where a wild boar grazes, leading the camera toward a wooden village gate. Finally, the shot passes through the gate and opens into the settlement interior, moving past burning torches and a straw-laden cart toward the shaded entrance of a thatched-roof farmhouse.
